text: Purpose - The formation of religious character is necessary for individual development, to form the spirit of believers and determine their behavior and attitudes. The character of religious beliefs is embodied in moral behavior, which in turn reaches its peak in the form ofsteadfastness towards religious education. One of the religious educations aimed at increasing closeness to Allah SWT and increasing believers’ steadfastness in following the laws and commandments of Islam is mujahadah. This study aims to look further into the mujahadah activities carried out by students in PONDAA that go beyond just performing religious rituals, until finally they become a tool for learning students’ religious character. Methods - The method used in this research is library research. In this research, the data is taken from several references and literature studies in connection with the research problems, which are analyzed using a qualitative approach. In qualitative research, data is formed of words. In this study, the author collects data from library research through several stages, including searching, reading, taking notes and processing the data. Findings - The findings of this study confirm the relationship between the mujahadah activities and students’ religious character in the PONDAA. Besides, it is also found that the mujahadah carried out by the students has a direct effect on the students’ attitudes and personalities. Hence, the conclusion of this research is that the mujahadah carried out by students in PONDAA is a very effective learning process for forming the character of religious students. The mujahadah activities carried out by students encompass several aspects, namely aspects of spirit, social and psychological, so that students who participate in the activities can become individuals with faith that is steadfast and at the same time independent and responsible. Research Implications - The implication of the results of this study is that PONDAA is expected to further enhance and optimize the mujahadah activities carried out by students in order to achieve the aims of religious education and to form the students’ religious character. The way to achieve it is by utilizing the strategy of Islamic education. This activity is expected to be effective in forming the students’ character in the pesantren environment.
explanation: The text is well-structured with academic sections but contains minor grammar inconsistencies and generic phrasing that can be produced by AI; overall a moderate likelihood of AI authorship.
